passes: pnpm verify passes from a clean install
opening /assist performs one initial conversation load and remains idle without a request loop
the Fastify asset upload route accepts an authenticated image payload and the uploaded asset can be read back
pnpm dead-code reports no new unused files or exports
the primary entry offers upload, paste, library, and AI generation without presenting a blank canvas first
uploading or selecting an image creates or opens a workbench, places the image, and reveals the style workflow
the empty and loading states remain usable at desktop and narrow viewport widths
the active image exposes four to six visibly distinct computational style directions based on the canonical render families
ASCII, halftone, and signal-damage controls are reachable from the main style workflow without hidden panels
style changes update the preview continuously and preserve authored state across workbench reload
caption, timestamp, and watermark overlays are reachable and agree between preview and export
1:1, 4:5, and 9:16 output ratios can be applied without rebuilding the project
PNG and JPEG exports complete at 1x and 2x and visually match the quality preview
the project automatically restores after a browser reload
a first-time browser flow completes input to export without relying on undocumented routes or hidden controls
fixed portrait, landscape, and high-detail assets pass human visual review for every published style direction
the release checklist covers input, style, overlay, ratio, restore, and export with recorded pass or first actionable failure
README describes only reachable first-version behavior and the production setup required to preserve assets
